queue.title: Guide: Best Gaming Mice for FPS 2026
queue.description: FPS-specific mouse guide. Top 5: G Pro X Superlight 2 (#1 pro choice), DeathAdder V3 (#2 budget ultralight), Zowie EC2-C (#3 wired pro), Razer Viper V2 Pro (#4 wireless ultralight), Logitech G305 (#5 budget wireless). Weight, sensor, shape sections. Pro usage stats. FAQ. Affiliate links.

queue.title: Versus: HyperX Cloud II vs Arctis Nova 7 Wireless
queue.description: Classic wired vs modern wireless. HyperX Cloud II ($99, 7.1 USB, titanium drivers, detachable mic) vs Arctis Nova 7 Wireless ($179, 2.4GHz+BT, 38hr, lossless). Value of $80 premium for wireless. 6-category breakdown, spec table, FAQ.

queue.title: Guide: Best 1440p Gaming Monitors 2026
queue.description: 1440p-specific monitor guide. 5 picks across budget tiers: AOC Q27G2 (~$230 entry), ASUS VG27AQ (~$280), LG 27GP850-B (~$299 fast IPS), Samsung Odyssey G7 (~$349 240Hz VA), ASUS PG279QM (~$549 240Hz Fast IPS). WQHD resolution explainer. GPU recommendations per monitor. FAQ.

queue.title: Versus: Logitech G305 vs Razer DeathAdder V3 HyperSpeed
